_comment: Ancient God Cultivation Cave (古神洞府) — a hidden underground cave dwelling in Jue Ming Valley where an ancient god once cultivated (CANON_RI_COMPLETE_WORLD.md L48, L52 — Jue Ming Valley death rift is the gateway to the Land of the Ancient God). Contains remnants of ancient god power. Stand-in: woodland mansion (rare, grand underground complex). Final: ancient-god cultivation chamber, remnant power crystals, sealed god-test inheritance, restriction-sealed entrance.
